prompt: A glossy, feminine scrapbook-style office announcement poster inspired by a sitcom workplace promo, in a vertical 2:3 composition. The scene shows 1 central woman standing in front of a group of 7 office coworkers inside a warm beige office with venetian blinds, desks, and a visible Dunder Mifflin-style wall sign in the background. The central woman has blonde hair in a messy high bun, a light pink floral V-neck dress, folded arms, and a confident, celebratory pose. Behind her, the 7 coworkers are arranged in a loose semicircle, wearing office attire in muted blues, browns, black, and lavender. Build the image as a mixed-media collage with torn paper, taped notes, brush-lettered headlines, glitter textures, flowers, and pink-and-gold accents. At the top left, place a pink rectangular company card with a white office icon and the text “DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC” and “PAPER COMPANY”. Across the upper center, place a large torn-paper headline reading “TRANSFER CONFIRMED” in expressive brush lettering, with “TRANSFER” in hot pink and “CONFIRMED” in black, plus pink underline strokes and a hand-drawn heart. At the top right, pin a small off-white note card with a pink pushpin and pink tape reading “NEW CHAPTER. NEW SCRANTON.” Near the lower center, layer a bold title made of 4 stacked text strips: “PENNY” on a pink paint-stroke banner, “IS” on a small white strip with 2 tiny hearts, “JOINING” on a gold brush-stroke banner, and “THE OFFICE” on a pale pink strip. On the lower left, hang a tall pink transfer tag clipped with a gold paperclip, reading “FROM DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC PAPER COMPANY / SCRANTON, PA / EST. 1949” and below that “TO THE OFFICE / SCRANTON, PA”, with a pink women-and-desk restroom-style icon at the bottom. On the lower right, place a pink note card with 3 labeled sections: “NEW ROLE” with “Sales Representative”, “NEW TEAM” with “Same Paper”, and “NEW MEMORIES” with “Let’s make some!”, each accented with small pink hearts. Along the bottom center, add a pink ribbon strip reading “DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC. WELCOMES PENNY♡”. Beneath that, include 3 small icon-and-text items in one row: sparkle icon with “NEW JOB”, group icon with “NEW TEAM”, and heart icon with “NEW MEMORIES”. At the bottom right, add large handwritten pink script saying “LET’S GO!”. Decorate the corners with pink peonies, tiny white filler flowers, torn paper edges, soft glitter dust, and subtle gold foil flecks. Use a warm rosy palette with blush pink, cream, gold, and black, with polished poster compositing, soft glam lighting, and a cheerful celebratory mood.
